name: drillable
description: Drillable's developer tools — ground your coding agent in real, cited sources instead of guesses.

plugins.name: cite
plugins.description: Ground your agent's REFERENCE claims — the MCP spec, agent practices, networking, units, and ~100 more domains — in a cited source instead of guessing. (Reach-only; verifying dependencies in CI is the separate Drillable Check.)

plugins.name: context
plugins.description: Ground your agent in YOUR project's facts — your docs, decisions, conventions — drilling them instead of guessing, and saying "no record" instead of bluffing. A local MCP server over a folder of markdown.
